### REQUEST ###
```
POST https://api2.cursor.sh:443/aiserver.v1.FileSyncService/FSUploadFile HTTP/1.1
Accept-Encoding: gzip
Authorization: Bearer REDACTED
Connect-Protocol-Version: 1
Connection: close
Content-Encoding: gzip
Content-Type: application/proto
Cookie: REDACTED

X-Request-Id: REDACTED
X-Session-Id: REDACTED
```

```
{
  "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
  "2:LEN": "src/miniqueue/broker.py",
  "3:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\r\nfrom typing import Any, Dict, List, Tuple\r\n\r\nimport redis.asyncio as redis\r\n\r\nfrom .config import get_settings\r\nfrom .logging import get_logger\r\nfrom .metrics import JOBS_ENQUEUED_TOTAL, QUEUE_DEPTH, WORKER_RECLAIMS_TOTAL\r\n\r\n\r\nlogger = get_logger(__name__, service=\"broker\")\r\n\r\n_redis_client: redis.Redis | None = None\r\n\r\n\r\ndef get_redis() -> redis.Redis:\r\n     global _redis_client\r\n     if _redis_client is None:\r\n         settings = get_settings()\r\n         _redis_client = redis.from_url(settings.redis_url)\r\n     return _redis_client\r\n \r\n \r\n def stream_for_queue(queue: str) -> str:\r\n     return f\"jobs:{queue}\"\r\n \r\n \r\n DEAD_LETTER_STREAM = \"jobs:dlq\"\r\n \r\n \r\n @dataclass\r\n class BrokerMessage:\r\n     stream: str\r\n     entry_id: str\r\n     fields: Dict[str, Any]\r\n \r\n \r\n async def ensure_group(queue: str) -> None:\r\n     \"\"\"Ensure the Redis Stream and consumer group exist.\"\"\"\r\n \r\n     settings = get_settings()\r\n     client = get_redis()\r\n     stream = stream_for_queue(queue)\r\n \r\n     try:\r\n         await client.xgroup_create(stream, settings.consumer_group, id=\"0-0\", mkstream=True)\r\n         logger.info(\"Created consumer group\", extra={\"stream\": stream})\r\n     except redis.exceptions.ResponseError as exc:\r\n         # BUSYGROUP means it already exists; ignore.\r\n         if \"BUSYGROUP\" not in str(exc):\r\n             raise\r\n \r\n \r\n async def enqueue_job(\r\n     *,\r\n     job_id: str,\r\n     job_type: str,\r\n     queue: str,\r\n     idempotency_key: str | None,\r\n ) -> str:\r\n     \"\"\"XADD a job reference to the appropriate stream.\"\"\"\r\n \r\n     client = get_redis()\r\n     stream = stream_for_queue(queue)\r\n     fields: Dict[str, Any] = {\r\n         \"job_id\": job_id,\r\n         \"type\": job_type,\r\n         \"queue\": queue,\r\n     }\r\n     if idempotency_key:\r\n         fields[\"idempotency_key\"] = idempotency_key\r\n \r\n     entry_id = await client.xadd(stream, fields)\r\n     JOBS_ENQUEUED_TOTAL.labels(type=job_type, queue=queue).inc()\r\n     return entry_id\r\n \r\n \r\n async def push_dead_letter(payload: Dict[str, Any]) -> str:\r\n     client = get_redis()\r\n     return await client.xadd(DEAD_LETTER_STREAM, payload)\r\n \r\n \r\n async def read_jobs(\r\n     *,\r\n     queue: str,\r\n     consumer_name: str,\r\n     count: int,\r\n     block_ms: int,\r\n ) -> List[BrokerMessage]:\r\n     \"\"\"Read from Redis Streams via XREADGROUP.\"\"\"\r\n \r\n     settings = get_settings()\r\n     client = get_redis()\r\n     stream = stream_for_queue(queue)\r\n \r\n     streams = {stream: \">\"}\r\n     resp: List[Tuple[str, List[Tuple[str, Dict[bytes, bytes]]]]] | None = await client.xreadgroup(\r\n         groupname=settings.consumer_group,\r\n         consumername=consumer_name,\r\n         streams=streams,\r\n         count=count,\r\n         block=block_ms,\r\n     )\r\n     messages: List[BrokerMessage] = []\r\n     if not resp:\r\n         return messages\r\n \r\n     for stream_name, entries in resp:\r\n         for entry_id, raw_fields in entries:\r\n             decoded = {k.decode(): v.decode() for k, v in raw_fields.items()}\r\n             messages.append(BrokerMessage(stream=stream_name, entry_id=entry_id, fields=decoded))\r\n     return messages\r\n \r\n \r\n async def ack_job(queue: str, entry_id: str) -> int:\r\n     \"\"\"Acknowledge processing of a job.\"\"\"\r\n \r\n     settings = get_settings()\r\n     client = get_redis()\r\n     stream = stream_for_queue(queue)\r\n     return int(\r\n         await client.xack(\r\n             stream,\r\n             settings.consumer_group,\r\n             entry_id,\r\n         )\r\n     )\r\n \r\n \r\n async def reclaim_stuck(\r\n     *,\r\n     queue: str,\r\n     consumer_name: str,\r\n     min_idle_ms: int,\r\n     count: int = 10,\r\n ) -> List[BrokerMessage]:\r\n     \"\"\"Reclaim messages that have been idle longer than min_idle_ms using XAUTOCLAIM.\"\"\"\r\n \r\n     settings = get_settings()\r\n     client = get_redis()\r\n     stream = stream_for_queue(queue)\r\n \r\n     start_id = \"0-0\"\r\n     messages: List[BrokerMessage] = []\r\n \r\n     try:\r\n         start_id, claimed = await client.xautoclaim(  # type: ignore[assignment]\r\n             stream,\r\n             settings.consumer_group,\r\n             consumer_name,\r\n             min_idle_ms,\r\n             start_id,\r\n             count=count,\r\n         )\r\n     except redis.ResponseError:\r\n         # If group does not yet exist, nothing to reclaim.\r\n         return messages\r\n \r\n     for entry_id, raw_fields in claimed:\r\n         decoded = {k.decode(): v.decode() for k, v in raw_fields.items()}\r\n         messages.append(BrokerMessage(stream=stream, entry_id=entry_id, fields=decoded))\r\n \r\n     if messages:\r\n         WORKER_RECLAIMS_TOTAL.inc(len(messages))\r\n \r\n     return messages\r\n \r\n \r\n async def update_queue_depth(queue: str) -> None:\r\n     \"\"\"Update the queue depth gauge for a given queue.\"\"\"\r\n \r\n     client = get_redis()\r\n     stream = stream_for_queue(queue)\r\n     length = await client.xlen(stream)\r\n     QUEUE_DEPTH.labels(queue=queue).set(length)\r\n \r\n",
  "4:VARINT": 2
}
```

### RESPONSE ###
```
HTTP/1.1 200 OK
Access-Control-Allow-Credentials: true
Access-Control-Expose-Headers: Grpc-Status\, Grpc-Message\, Grpc-Status-Details-Bin\, Content-Encoding\, Connect-Content-Encoding\, traceparent\, backend-traceparent\, x-amzn-trace-id\, x-request-id
Content-Type: application/proto
Date: Thu\, 05 Mar 2026 03:07:14 GMT
Set-Cookie: REDACTED
Vary: Origin
```

```
{}
```

### SIGNATURE ###
```

http:method is POST
http:queryparams is -NONE-
http:requestBodyJSON is {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "src/miniqueue/broker.py", "3:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\r\nfrom typing import Any, Dict, List, Tuple\r\n\r\nimport redis.asyncio as redis\r\n\r\nfrom .config import get_settings\r\nfrom .logging import get_logger\r\nfrom .metrics import JOBS_ENQUEUED_TOTAL, QUEUE_DEPTH, WORKER_RECLAIMS_TOTAL\r\n\r\n\r\nlogger = get_logger(__name__, service=\"broker\")\r\n\r\n_redis_client: redis.Redis | None = None\r\n\r\n\r\ndef get_redis() -> redis.Redis:\r\n     global _redis_client\r\n     if _redis_client is None:\r\n         settings = get_settings()\r\n         _redis_client = redis.from_url(settings.redis_url)\r\n     return _redis_client\r\n \r\n \r\n def stream_for_queue(queue: str) -> str:\r\n     return f\"jobs:{queue}\"\r\n \r\n \r\n DEAD_LETTER_STREAM = \"jobs:dlq\"\r\n \r\n \r\n @dataclass\r\n class BrokerMessage:\r\n     stream: str\r\n     entry_id: str\r\n     fields: Dict[str, Any]\r\n \r\n \r\n async def ensure_group(queue: str) -> None:\r\n     \"\"\"Ensure the Redis Stream and consumer group exist.\"\"\"\r\n \r\n     settings = get_settings()\r\n     client = get_redis()\r\n     stream = stream_for_queue(queue)\r\n \r\n     try:\r\n         await client.xgroup_create(stream, settings.consumer_group, id=\"0-0\", mkstream=True)\r\n         logger.info(\"Created consumer group\", extra={\"stream\": stream})\r\n     except redis.exceptions.ResponseError as exc:\r\n         # BUSYGROUP means it already exists; ignore.\r\n         if \"BUSYGROUP\" not in str(exc):\r\n             raise\r\n \r\n \r\n async def enqueue_job(\r\n     *,\r\n     job_id: str,\r\n     job_type: str,\r\n     queue: str,\r\n     idempotency_key: str | None,\r\n ) -> str:\r\n     \"\"\"XADD a job reference to the appropriate stream.\"\"\"\r\n \r\n     client = get_redis()\r\n     stream = stream_for_queue(queue)\r\n     fields: Dict[str, Any] = {\r\n         \"job_id\": job_id,\r\n         \"type\": job_type,\r\n         \"queue\": queue,\r\n     }\r\n     if idempotency_key:\r\n         fields[\"idempotency_key\"] = idempotency_key\r\n \r\n     entry_id = await client.xadd(stream, fields)\r\n     JOBS_ENQUEUED_TOTAL.labels(type=job_type, queue=queue).inc()\r\n     return entry_id\r\n \r\n \r\n async def push_dead_letter(payload: Dict[str, Any]) -> str:\r\n     client = get_redis()\r\n     return await client.xadd(DEAD_LETTER_STREAM, payload)\r\n \r\n \r\n async def read_jobs(\r\n     *,\r\n     queue: str,\r\n     consumer_name: str,\r\n     count: int,\r\n     block_ms: int,\r\n ) -> List[BrokerMessage]:\r\n     \"\"\"Read from Redis Streams via XREADGROUP.\"\"\"\r\n \r\n     settings = get_settings()\r\n     client = get_redis()\r\n     stream = stream_for_queue(queue)\r\n \r\n     streams = {stream: \">\"}\r\n     resp: List[Tuple[str, List[Tuple[str, Dict[bytes, bytes]]]]] | None = await client.xreadgroup(\r\n         groupname=settings.consumer_group,\r\n         consumername=consumer_name,\r\n         streams=streams,\r\n         count=count,\r\n         block=block_ms,\r\n     )\r\n     messages: List[BrokerMessage] = []\r\n     if not resp:\r\n         return messages\r\n \r\n     for stream_name, entries in resp:\r\n         for entry_id, raw_fields in entries:\r\n             decoded = {k.decode(): v.decode() for k, v in raw_fields.items()}\r\n             messages.append(BrokerMessage(stream=stream_name, entry_id=entry_id, fields=decoded))\r\n     return messages\r\n \r\n \r\n async def ack_job(queue: str, entry_id: str) -> int:\r\n     \"\"\"Acknowledge processing of a job.\"\"\"\r\n \r\n     settings = get_settings()\r\n     client = get_redis()\r\n     stream = stream_for_queue(queue)\r\n     return int(\r\n         await client.xack(\r\n             stream,\r\n             settings.consumer_group,\r\n             entry_id,\r\n         )\r\n     )\r\n \r\n \r\n async def reclaim_stuck(\r\n     *,\r\n     queue: str,\r\n     consumer_name: str,\r\n     min_idle_ms: int,\r\n     count: int = 10,\r\n ) -> List[BrokerMessage]:\r\n     \"\"\"Reclaim messages that have been idle longer than min_idle_ms using XAUTOCLAIM.\"\"\"\r\n \r\n     settings = get_settings()\r\n     client = get_redis()\r\n     stream = stream_for_queue(queue)\r\n \r\n     start_id = \"0-0\"\r\n     messages: List[BrokerMessage] = []\r\n \r\n     try:\r\n         start_id, claimed = await client.xautoclaim(  # type: ignore[assignment]\r\n             stream,\r\n             settings.consumer_group,\r\n             consumer_name,\r\n             min_idle_ms,\r\n             start_id,\r\n             count=count,\r\n         )\r\n     except redis.ResponseError:\r\n         # If group does not yet exist, nothing to reclaim.\r\n         return messages\r\n \r\n     for entry_id, raw_fields in claimed:\r\n         decoded = {k.decode(): v.decode() for k, v in raw_fields.items()}\r\n         messages.append(BrokerMessage(stream=stream, entry_id=entry_id, fields=decoded))\r\n \r\n     if messages:\r\n         WORKER_RECLAIMS_TOTAL.inc(len(messages))\r\n \r\n     return messages\r\n \r\n \r\n async def update_queue_depth(queue: str) -> None:\r\n     \"\"\"Update the queue depth gauge for a given queue.\"\"\"\r\n \r\n     client = get_redis()\r\n     stream = stream_for_queue(queue)\r\n     length = await client.xlen(stream)\r\n     QUEUE_DEPTH.labels(queue=queue).set(length)\r\n \r\n", "4:VARINT": 2}
http:url is /aiserver.v1.FileSyncService/FSUploadFile
```
